The health benefits of Cocculus indicus include its use as a sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in treating anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps. The bioactive constituents of Cocculus indicus include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
